name: skill SKILL.md frontmatter declares a trigger that fires after a pattern extraction completes successfully
command: head -40 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/SKILL.md" 2>err.txt > head.txt && grep -q 'trigger: after-pattern-extraction' head.txt && grep -q 'name: pr-to-eval-dataset' head.txt && echo ok 1>&2
